recommendation_summary: Quiet editorial operations deck with warm paper background, deep green authority color, muted gold accents, and restrained rule lines.

visual_language.card_recipe: white paper panels, 1px warm border, square corners, no glass or glow
visual_language.heading_recipe: heavy sans-serif title, deep green text, gold rule accent
visual_language.accent_bar_recipe: thin gold rule lines and small square markers
visual_language.bg_decoration: warm paper base with subtle grid and no gradient blobs
visual_language.diagram_recipe: rule-line diagrams with labeled nodes and restrained gold emphasis
visual_language.chart_recipe: simple editorial charts with deep green primary data and gold highlight annotations

consistency_rules: Use token_extensions as CSS variable overrides on every slide root.
Do not use the preset default red accent when design_dna overrides --ppt-accent.
Do not hardcode visual colors directly in JSX; map ui-ux-pro-max colors into --ppt-* variables first.

composition_rules.focal_point_rule: Each slide uses either one dominant statement, one metric, or one diagram as the first-read element.
composition_rules.density_rule: Use 3-5 primary content groups per slide; avoid uniform card grids unless the slide compares peers.
composition_rules.whitespace_rule: Keep wide paper margins and separate evidence groups with rule lines, not heavy containers.

visual_mandates.stats_slides_require: native text plus simple rasterized chart blocks
